package.name: @igrp/framework-next-template-new
package.description: The canonical example of how to consume the IGRP framework. Next.js 15 + Turbopack.

persona.mindset: Default to Server Components; drop to "use client" deliberately. Every UI element comes from the design system.

topics.topic: bundle analysis via ANALYZE=true next build

technology.name: Next.js 15 async APIs
technology.warning: Missing await is a runtime bug.

template-flow.step: Validates NextAuth session, bypasses public/login/logout/API routes, honors IGRP_PREVIEW_MODE.
Auth checks, session load, renders IGRPLayout with header/sidebar around the route group.
igrpBuildConfig assembles layout + API + toaster + session config; swaps in mock data when IGRP_PREVIEW_MODE=true.
Fetches layout + session server-side. NextAuth routes under api/auth/*.

preview-mode.constraint: Middleware and both layouts check this flag. If you touch middleware or any layout, both paths (preview on / preview off) must still work.

ui-rules.rule: All UI from @igrp/igrp-framework-react-design-system. Horizon (IGRP*) first; Primitives only when needed. Every importing file needs 'use client'.
Forms ALWAYS use IGRPForm + Zod. Never raw <form> or direct react-hook-form.
Only semantic tokens (bg-background, text-foreground). No raw Tailwind colors.
cn() for class merging. size-* when w=h. flex gap-* over space-x/y-*.
Authoritative component reference: templates/demo/skills/igrp-design-system/SKILL.md. Load only the sub-files you need — the skill tree is large.

notes.note: App compiles Tailwind once — framework packages don't.

rules.rule: Consumed as workspace:* — framework edits require pnpm build:framework before pnpm dev:demo picks them up.
Changesets only if the template itself is user-visible; framework changes belong on the framework package's changeset.
Biome (not ESLint). Don't run ESLint/Prettier here.

review-checklist.item: All UI from the DS. Reject hand-rolled components when Horizon exists.
IGRPForm + Zod for every form. Reject raw <form>.
Semantic tokens only. Reject bg-blue-500-style classes.
Server Components by default. Question every new "use client".

example.name: Canonical form pattern
